channel.title: IT Resume Tips on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in IT Resume Tips on simeononsecurity

item.title: IT Resume Writing Tips: How to Write a Resume That Gets You Hired
item.category: "IT resume tips" , "IT resume writing" , "IT resume format" , "ATS resume IT" , "sysadmin resume" , "cloud engineer resume" , "help desk resume" , "IT resume keywords" , "IT resume 2026"
item.description: Practical IT resume writing tips — how to structure your resume, use ATS-friendly formatting, highlight certifications and home lab experience, and tailor for each application.
